subcodes.first_line: Concerning the matter of acquiring the designated house, again hath been sent down from the heaven of Command: "Soon shall We raise up one who will purchase that which thou didst desire with love." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در فقره ابتیاع بیت مخصوص مجددا از سماء امر نازل سوف نبعث من یشتری ما اردته بالحب
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @business; financial; property matters
